basis: the cumulative ceiling is FIXED at the last provider-verified spend before any Phase 2 stage execution (209.24, verified 2026-07-19T00:51:42Z) plus the approved incremental ceiling 1500. Recomputing it from current spend after execution begins would raise the ceiling by every dollar spent, unbounding the cap over time; the 2026-07-19b snapshot's ceiling field made exactly that error and is superseded by this record. The snapshot's spend/credit figures themselves remain valid evidence.
